justification: MJ produced a full architecture design with 10 components, 10 interfaces, 6 patterns, 4 trade-offs, domain model, implementation guidance, and file structure — all from a prompt with missing NFRs. The agent invented assumptions (team size 5-20, single geographic market, mobile-first) and designed against them instead of escalating. The escalations array is empty, meaning MJ never flagged the missing NFRs. Every fail criterion is triggered: architecture pattern recommended (event-driven microservices/modular monolith), NFRs invented, trade_offs produced, lengthy document produced from an empty brief.

observations.text: Produced a complete architecture with 10 components, detailed interfaces, and implementation guidance instead of escalating
Invented NFR assumptions: team size 5-20, single region, mobile-first, standard marketplace model
Recommended specific patterns: event-driven architecture, saga orchestration, CQRS, modular monolith
Produced 4 detailed trade-off analyses for unjustified design decisions
Empty escalations array — no questions asked about missing requirements
Confidence level of 82 suggests high certainty despite acknowledging missing scale requirements and team size in low_confidence_areas
Low confidence areas do acknowledge that scale requirements and team size are unknown, but this was buried in the output rather than used as a reason to escalate
